metadata.title: Analyze the ambiguous healthcare administration software build request from South Asia using the compliance lens, and produce a structured mirrorOS analysis prompt that resolves missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria into a governed artifact with explicit validation gates.

mission.primary_objective: Analyze the ambiguous healthcare administration software build request from South Asia using the compliance lens, and produce a structured mirrorOS analysis prompt that resolves missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria into a governed artifact with explicit validation gates.
mission.success_definition: All ambiguous elements (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) are identified and flagged with resolution paths.; Validation gates are defined for each section of the mirrorOS analysis prompt.; The output is a valid SR8-compilable directive with all required sections.; The artifact is governed and traceable to the original chaotic input.

in_scope.item: The analysis covers the healthcare administration domain in South Asia, focusing on compliance requirements (e.g., data privacy, regulatory standards), software build feasibility, and the transformation of chaotic input into a compilable SR8 directive. It does not include actual software implementation or deployment.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: All ambiguous elements (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) are identified and flagged with resolution paths.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are defined for each section of the mirrorOS analysis prompt.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: The output is a valid SR8-compilable directive with all required sections.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: The artifact is governed and traceable to the original chaotic input.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.analysis_subject: Analyze the ambiguous healthcare administration software build request from South Asia using the compliance lens, and produce a structured mirrorOS analysis prompt that resolves missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria into a governed artifact with explicit validation gates.

mirrors.item: The analysis covers the healthcare administration domain in South Asia, focusing on compliance requirements (e.g., data privacy, regulatory standards), software build feasibility, and the transformation of chaotic input into a compilable SR8 directive. It does not include actual software implementation or deployment.

contradiction_checks.item: Must use compliance_lens as the primary analytical framework.
Must handle ambiguous_scope input type without assuming missing details.
Must produce explicit validation gates for each section of the output.
Must not generate executable code or deployment instructions.
Must adhere to SR8 compilation standards for objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

SRXML_Artifact.synthesis_contract: format: JSON; sections: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent; compiled_intent_structure: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: array of strings; Success Criteria: array of strings; Output Contract: object with format and sections; validation_gates: Gate 1: Confirm artifact_type is mirroros_analysis_prompt.; Gate 2: Confirm depth_tier is D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE.; Gate 3: Confirm runtime_target is Codex.; Gate 4: Confirm should_block is false.; Gate 5: Confirm compiled_intent contains all five required sections.; Gate 6: Confirm each section in compiled_intent is non-empty and logically consistent.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
